name: clinica-psicologia-sep
description: Sistema completo para Gestão da Clínica Escola de Psicologia

scripts.dev: npm run db:push && concurrently -c "cyan.bold,yellow.bold" -n "BACKEND,WEB" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:web"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
